name: Power Quick Toggles
description: Quick Settings toggles for ThinkPad power tuning. Ultra PowerSaving forces tuned to 'laptop-battery-powersave' (below GNOME's built-in power-saver rung). GPU Boost raises Intel MMIO RAPL PL1/PL2 from the 20W/43W OEM defaults to 55W/55W for iGPU-bound workloads.
